DUE TO THE UNAVAILABILITY OF COURTROOMS, THE COURT REQUESTED PARTIES STIPULATE TO NEW DATE. NO STIPULATION COULD BE REACHED. THE COURT SELECTS 5/10/04 AT 9:30AM AS THE TRIAL DATE.

JUDGE ROBERT DONDERO, CLERK: DIANNE BOFFI /VERA MU, COURT REPORTER: JOANNE BRICE. REMOVED FROM MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR MAY-10-2004 - NO APPEARANCE BY THE PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF THE DEFENDANT. COMPLAINT IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. CROSS-COMPLAINT DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE.
